CustomField.description: Investment required to reconfigure the aircraft to the client's requirements. This is a build up of the costs as specified in the Modification Cost section below with details.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the reconfiguration costs are calculated with a bottoms up approach considering all the mod costs, this field would calculate the total using Modification Cost Detail section in the related list on the right of this page.
CustomField.label: Investment Required
